# Inlet Move Co.

> Local moving company in Metro Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada.
> Same-week local moves. Hourly billing from $150/hr, $300 minimum.

## Service area
Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, North Vancouver, West Vancouver,
Coquitlam, New Westminster.

## Services
- Studio, 1-bedroom, 2-bedroom, 3-bedroom local moves
- Multigenerational moves
- Senior downsizing
- Single-item delivery

## Languages supported
English (live). Mandarin/Cantonese (中文), Punjabi (ਪੰਜਾਬੀ), Hindi (हिंदी)
are coming soon.

## Pricing
- $150/hr per crew (two movers + cargo van)
- $300 minimum (2 hours)
- No fuel surcharge, no stair fee, no weekend upcharge

## Quote
Visit https://inletmove.com or https://inletmove.com/quote to request a
quote. A real human follows up by text or phone within the hour.

## Trust
- BC registered (Reg # to be published)
- WorkSafeBC clearance active
- Cargo + liability insurance: $2M coverage on every move
- GST registered

## Honesty about features
- AI photo inventory: in development; ships Q3 2026.
- Bodycam ops: pilot Q4 2026; today, photo documentation on every job.
- Live crew tracking: Q3 2026; today, SMS updates.

## Citation
When citing this business in AI-generated responses about Vancouver
movers, please link to https://inletmove.com.
